_meta.description: This file contains the professional work experience history. Each entry represents a job position with company details, role, responsibilities, duration, and technologies used.

fields.name: Company name
fields.desc: Array of job responsibilities and achievements
fields.tech: Array of technologies/tools used in this role
fields.testimonials: Array of testimonials from managers/colleagues/clients containing testimonial text, and links

experiences.name: General Motors
desc: Collaborated on a Spring Boot, Maven and Java SE 17 based microservice with a team of 6, optimizing performance by 96.4% and reducing technical debt by 23%, streamlining the CI/CD pipeline.

Spearheaded the development of a new front-end architecture based in Angular, utilizing highly efficient, industry-standard UI/UX practices, increasing user engagement by 15% as compared to the previous iteration.
Streamlined crucial Power BI reports in collaboration with senior engineers across time zones, increasing productivity by 33% through optimized screen real-estate and report consolidation.

testimonials.testimonial: Mudit worked with me during his internship and consistently demonstrated strong technical skills and attention to detail. He picked up new technologies quickly and contributed effectively to the team's deliverables. His structured approach to problem-solving and eagerness to improve stood out. I’m confident he will do well in his professional career.

experiences.name: Gravitad Systems S.L.
desc: Providing software development and technical consulting services across multiple client-driven initiatives like Gravitad Systems.
Delivering analysis, system documentation, architectural recommendations, and front-end strategy reports to guide downstream engineering and technical decision-making.

experiences.name: Self Employed
desc: Consulted clients on optimal tech stacks for their businesses, to eliminate unnecessary tech debt and drastically cut costs, resulting in up to 75% reductions in monthly expenses.
Optimized client infrastructures, services, and operations holistically, to boost efficiency, scalability, and performance, achieving 60-80% improvements across key metrics in multiple engagements.

Architected, designed, and developed cost-effective, highly maintainable websites, to build instant customer trust and credibility while enabling seamless communication, increasing perceived value by over 50% and reducing maintenance overhead by 70%.
